name: Salmon Cakes with Lemon-Herb Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh thyme, or 2 tsp. dried
2 1/2 teaspoons chopped fresh thyme, or 1 tsp. dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salmon, cornflake crumbs, green onions, celery, 1/4 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons fresh thyme, and Worcestershire sauce in a medium bowl. Stir gently to blend. Season with salt and pepper. Mix in egg. Shape the salmon mixture into 6 patties, about 3/4-inch thick. Arrange on a plate.
2. Combine 3/4 cup mayonnaise, lemon juice, horseradish, and 2-1/2 teaspoons fresh thyme (or 1 tsp. dried) in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper. Salmon cakes and sauce can be prepared up to one day ahead. Wrap separately and refrigerate.
3. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-low heat. Add salmon cakes and sauté until brown and cooked through, about 5 minutes per side. Transfer to a platter. Serve with the sauce.
